center.name: 大湖地区
center.summary: 大湖地区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括白头鹞、索马里伯劳，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Some birds winter in milder regions of southern and western Europe, while others migrate to the Sahel, Nile basin and Great Lakes region in Africa, or to Arabia, the Indian subcontinent, and Myanmar

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Other common names include the Karoli fiscal, the Somali fiscal shrike and the Somali shrike. The bird is found in Djibouti, Ethiopia and Somalia in the Horn of Africa, as well as in Kenya in the African Great Lakes region
